TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: tu sep tu lim - tu sep tu nem mihcaan Cung-Z' sakayhekal nu kalawlawan 2025‚ÄĒ2026 ŚĻīšł≠śó•Ś§Ėšļ§ťĘ®ś≥Ę tu sep tu lim mihcaan cacay bulad pic demiad, u Dipung sakakaay ci Kaw-se-caw-miaw Kuo-huy Cung-yi-yen papalitaan nu taw sa, saan Cung-hua-zen-min-kung-he-kuo misuayaw tu Taywan tu sakalepacaw hakiya a ma'dis ku Dipung " sakapatay sakaudip nu kabalihenawan nu kawaw", sipakaylalabu tu Dipung hakiya a patahekal tu Ce-wi-tuy amidebung tu Taywan. sakatusa a demiad, Cung-hua-zen-min-kung-he-kuo atu duma nu kanatal idaw ku sapaculian, maynah tu Dipung " milauyt mikuwan tu sakaylalabu nu Cung-kuo", Cung-hua-zen-min-kung-he-kuo itida i Ta-pan nu sakakaay a tademaw ci Sei-cin itida i sakasasakamuan nu singbungan musakamu tu ci Kaw-se-caw-miaw tu nakamuan nida " putunen ku mauningay nu tangah sa", saa ku Dipunay a tademaw u mahiniay nu imi amaedis ci Kaw-se sa. 2025ŚĻī11śúą7śó•, X . Cung-hua-zen-min-kung-he-kuo sakay hekal nu kanatalan tu sapilawlawan, micunus aca sapiliwku a kamuan, setupen ku sapatayni i Dipung tu nanuman a tuudan, nalimaan nu tuudan, lawpesen ku hayyu nu Dipung itidai Hua nu hayyuan tu miwada tu kalisiw, caay kalecad tu binacadan, saan a mitudu' tu wayway nu Dipung mubuwah aca tu hitay. . ina Dipung kinapina a musakamu " itini sakay Taywan caay ka sumad sa", nika caay piyiwkiw tu Cung-faung miala tu Taywan nu sasakamuen. paculi ku Dipung tu Cung saan mutudu', saan tu Dipung nikaydaan tu sakatusa a nikalepacawan mahida tu ku wayway nu heni tu sakay kapah sa. sakala pilabuan nu sakatulu nu Cung-hua-min-kuo sifu tina sakayhekalan nu a nipacukelan tu Dipung, u Amilika hantu naynayi ku tekiteki aca, saan ku Kuo-huy nu Amilika miyiwkiw amana kapicidek malawlaw sa. . Cung-hua-zen-min-kung-he-kuo sapaculi tu sakay hekal Ś§Ėšļ§śäóŤ≠į Cung-hua-zen-min-kung-he-kuo musakamuay a tademaw ci Lin-cin, sakay hekal musakamuay a tademaw ci Maw-nin, Kuo-tay-pan musakamuay a tademaw ci Cen-pin-hua, Kuo-fan-pu musakamuay a tademaw ci Cin-pin-cun sakamusa ci Kaw-se-caw-meiw sakamusa tu picidekan nu sapaculian, Cung-kuo singbungkisya musakamu ci Kaw-se-caw-meiw an. u Dipun nu sakakaay ci Kun-mu-yen-nen, sakay hekal nu sakakaay ci Maw-mu-min-cun, Ce-min-tan mikisaan a kayciw ci Seiw-lin-in-ce saan tu ci Sey-cin a kamu caay ka nu tademawaan sa. . pikunglingan tu hitay atu sakalecad nu kawawan ŤĽćšļčśľĒÁŅíŚŹäÁõłťóúśäóŤ≠į ina Dipun mipulung tu katuuday itida i nipikunglingan nu Dipun mikilul tu mikantuk nikaytida i Leiw-nin nu hitayan, ina Dipun sakay tida i bayu nu sapidiputaw mahida tu ku wayway. sabaw tusa bulad siwa demiad, Cung-kuo atu E'-luo-se nu hitayan malalinlaku itida i tapukuan a milawilaw tu nikalepacawan. sakatusa nu demiad, ina Dipun atu Amilika Cung-kuo micukaymas tu AI patahekal tu la'cusay nu hinzian. 64 AIÁĒüśąźŤ≤†ťĚĘŤ®äśĀĮ Cung-hua-min-kuo (Taywan) šł≠ŤŹĮśįĎŚúč Cung-hua-min-kuo Cung-tung ci Lay-cin-de sabaw pitu a demiad saan ," Cung-kuo misuayaw tu Dipun malingatu mipeci' tu canancanan nu sapiedisan, pihaceng ku mapaedis ku In-tay kitidaan atu sakakapah tu sakalecabay". saan ci nida "u Cung-kuo acaay kala kitidaan nu sakakapah a milawilaway a tademaw". saan ku Cung-hua-min-kuo sakayhekalan a tademaw ina Cung-kuo itida sananay i Lein-he-kuo dayhiw ci Hu-cung patayda tu cudad i Lein-he-kuo misu ci Ku-te'-lei-se ilabu nu nisulitan a cudada caay kaw nu tademawan sa. itini i Cung-hua-zen-min-kung-he-kuo atu udip tu nu kanatal pu'tan ku sakatayda nu sakay nanum nu tuudan, ci Lay-cin-de itini i mei-ti musakamu tu namaka Dipunay a kakanan nu bayuay, pacukel ci nida tu Dipun. Cung-hua-min-kuo sakay hekal nu sakakaay ci Lin-cia-lung saan, " pacukel kaku tu Dipun, a pu'tan ku wayway nu Cung-kun tu sapilawacu". saan naca kina Cung-hua-min-kuo " ina Tay-Hay naynai' ku kangki, ina Tay-wan mahida tu ku wayway sa, mihantay tu Cung-fun u kuwang ku sapiedis, mihantay tu Cung-fan tu masacacayay nu nikasumadan nu waywayan". ". ci Kaw-se-caw-meiw itida i sabaw tusa bulad saan " miliwkay kasikadan" tu Lein-he-kun-paw, Cung-hua-zen-min-kung-he-kuo misuayaw tu Taywan saan tu sapialaw tu lalaan. u singbung nu Lein-he-paw tabaki ku sulit sapipatay tu tademaw, paceba sa musakamu saan ci Kaw-se palutatengan tu Cung-hua-zen-min-kung-he-kuo tu sapisuayaw tu Taywan tu satalakaway nu kinlian, nikudan mikilim kina Taywan tina kawawan paculi han tu caay kaw tatengaay ku mahiniay a kawaw sa. .
S.PHON: tu s…ôp tu r~…ĺim - tu s…ôp tu n…ôm mińß ¶aan ¶uŇč-z Ē~ ° sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan ********* ******* tu s…ôp tu r~…ĺim mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj bur~…ĺad pi ¶ d…ômiad, u dipuŇč sakakaaj ¶i kaw-s…ô- ¶aw-miaw kuo-ńßuj ¶uŇč-ji-j…ôn papar~…ĺitaan nu taw sa, saan ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuo misuajaw tu tajwan tu sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw ńßakija a ma Ē~ °dis ku dipuŇč " sakapataj sakaudip nu kabar~…ĺińß…ônawan nu kawaw", sipakajr~…ĺar~…ĺabu tu dipuŇč ńßakija a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ¶…ô-wi-tuj amid…ôbuŇč tu tajwan. sakatusa a d…ômiad, ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuo atu duma nu kanatar~…ĺ idaw ku sapa ¶ur~…ĺian, majnańß tu dipuŇč " mir~…ĺaujt mikuwan tu sakajr~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu ¶uŇč-kuo", ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuo itida i ta-pan nu sakakaaj a tad…ômaw ¶i s…ôi- ¶in itida i sakasasakamuan nu siŇčbuŇčan musakamu tu ¶i kaw-s…ô- ¶aw-miaw tu nakamuan nida " putun…ôn ku mauniŇčaj nu taŇčańß sa", saa ku dipunaj a tad…ômaw u mańßiniaj nu imi ama…ôdis ¶i kaw-s…ô sa. **********, * . ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuo sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu kanatar~…ĺan tu sapir~…ĺawr~…ĺawan, mi ¶unus a ¶a sapir~…ĺiwku a kamuan, s…ôtup…ôn ku sapatajni i dipuŇč tu nanuman a tuudan, nar~…ĺimaan nu tuudan, r~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn ku ńßajju nu dipuŇč itidai ńßua nu ńßajjuan tu miwada tu kar~…ĺisiw, ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu bina ¶adan, saan a mitudu Ē~ ° tu wajwaj nu dipuŇč mubuwańß a ¶a tu ńßitaj. . ina dipuŇč kinapina a musakamu " itini sakaj tajwan ¶aaj ka sumad sa", nika ¶aaj pijiwkiw tu ¶uŇč-fauŇč miar~…ĺa tu tajwan nu sasakamu…ôn. pa ¶ur~…ĺi ku dipuŇč tu ¶uŇč saan mutudu Ē~ °, saan tu dipuŇč nikajdaan tu sakatusa a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan mańßida tu ku wajwaj nu ńß…ôni tu sakaj kapańß sa. sakar~…ĺa pir~…ĺabuan nu sakatur~…ĺu nu ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo sifu tina sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺan nu a nipa ¶uk…ôr~…ĺan tu dipuŇč, u amir~…ĺika ńßantu najnaji ku t…ôkit…ôki a ¶a, saan ku kuo-ńßuj nu amir~…ĺika mijiwkiw amana kapi ¶id…ôk mar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw sa. . ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuo sapa ¶ur~…ĺi tu sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ **** ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuo musakamuaj a tad…ômaw ¶i r~…ĺin- ¶in, sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ musakamuaj a tad…ômaw ¶i maw-nin, kuo-taj-pan musakamuaj a tad…ômaw ¶i ¶…ôn-pin-ńßua, kuo-fan-pu musakamuaj a tad…ômaw ¶i ¶in-pin- ¶un sakamusa ¶i kaw-s…ô- ¶aw-m…ôiw sakamusa tu pi ¶id…ôkan nu sapa ¶ur~…ĺian, ¶uŇč-kuo siŇčbuŇčkisja musakamu ¶i kaw-s…ô- ¶aw-m…ôiw an. u dipun nu sakakaaj ¶i kun-mu-j…ôn-n…ôn, sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu sakakaaj ¶i maw-mu-min- ¶un, ¶…ô-min-tan mikisaan a kaj ¶iw ¶i s…ôiw-r~…ĺin-in- ¶…ô saan tu ¶i s…ô- ¶in a kamu ¶aaj ka nu tad…ômawaan sa. . pikuŇčr~…ĺiŇčan tu ńßitaj atu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kawawan ********* ina dipun mipur~…ĺuŇč tu katuudaj itida i nipikuŇčr~…ĺiŇčan nu dipun mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu mikantuk nikajtida i r~…ĺ…ôiw-nin nu ńßitajan, ina dipun sakaj tida i baju nu sapidiputaw mańßida tu ku wajwaj. sabaw tusa bur~…ĺad siwa d…ômiad, ¶uŇč-kuo atu …ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺuo-s…ô nu ńßitajan mar~…ĺar~…ĺinr~…ĺaku itida i tapukuan a mir~…ĺawir~…ĺaw tu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan. sakatusa nu d…ômiad, ina dipun atu amir~…ĺika ¶uŇč-kuo mi ¶ukajmas tu ai patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj nu ńßinzian. ** ai****** ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo (tajwan) **** ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i r~…ĺaj- ¶in-d…ô sabaw pitu a d…ômiad saan ," ¶uŇč-kuo misuajaw tu dipun mar~…ĺiŇčatu mip…ô ¶i Ē~ ° tu ¶anan ¶anan nu sapi…ôdisan, pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku mapa…ôdis ku in-taj kitidaan atu sakakapańß tu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶abaj". saan ¶i nida "u ¶uŇč-kuo a ¶aaj kar~…ĺa kitidaan nu sakakapańß a mir~…ĺawir~…ĺawaj a tad…ômaw". saan ku ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺan a tad…ômaw ina ¶uŇč-kuo itida sananaj i r~…ĺ…ôin-ńß…ô-kuo dajńßiw ¶i ńßu- ¶uŇč patajda tu ¶udad i r~…ĺ…ôin-ńß…ô-kuo misu ¶i ku-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺ…ôi-s…ô ir~…ĺabu nu nisur~…ĺitan a ¶udada ¶aaj kaw nu tad…ômawan sa. itini i ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuo atu udip tu nu kanatar~…ĺ pu Ē~ °tan ku sakatajda nu sakaj nanum nu tuudan, ¶i r~…ĺaj- ¶in-d…ô itini i m…ôi-ti musakamu tu namaka dipunaj a kakanan nu bajuaj, pa ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ ¶i nida tu dipun. ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu sakakaaj ¶i r~…ĺin- ¶ia-r~…ĺuŇč saan, " pa ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ kaku tu dipun, a pu Ē~ °tan ku wajwaj nu ¶uŇč-kun tu sapir~…ĺawa ¶u". saan na ¶a kina ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo " ina taj-ńßaj najnai Ē~ ° ku kaŇčki, ina taj-wan mańßida tu ku wajwaj sa, mińßantaj tu ¶uŇč-fun u kuwaŇč ku sapi…ôdis, mińßantaj tu ¶uŇč-fan tu masa ¶a ¶ajaj nu nikasumadan nu wajwajan". ". ¶i kaw-s…ô- ¶aw-m…ôiw itida i sabaw tusa bur~…ĺad saan " mir~…ĺiwkaj kasikadan" tu r~…ĺ…ôin-ńß…ô-kun-paw, ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuo misuajaw tu tajwan saan tu sapiar~…ĺaw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaan. u siŇčbuŇč nu r~…ĺ…ôin-ńß…ô-paw tabaki ku sur~…ĺit sapipataj tu tad…ômaw, pa ¶…ôba sa musakamu saan ¶i kaw-s…ô par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan tu ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuo tu sapisuajaw tu tajwan tu satar~…ĺakawaj nu kinr~…ĺian, nikudan mikir~…ĺim kina tajwan tina kawawan pa ¶ur~…ĺi ńßan tu ¶aaj kaw tat…ôŇčaaj ku mańßiniaj a kawaw sa. .
S.FORM: tu sep tu lim - tu sep tu nem mihcaan Cung-Z' sakayhekal nu kalawlawan 2025‚ÄĒ2026 ŚĻīšł≠śó•Ś§Ėšļ§ťĘ®ś≥Ę tu sep tu lim mihcaan cacay bulad pic demiad, u Dipung sakakaay ci Kaw-se-caw-miaw Kuo-huy Cung-yi-yen papalitaan nu taw sa, saan Cung-hua-zen-min-kung-he-kuo misuayaw tu Taywan tu sakalepacaw hakiya a ma'dis ku Dipung " sakapatay sakaudip nu kabalihenawan nu kawaw", sipakaylalabu tu Dipung hakiya a patahekal tu Ce-wi-tuy amidebung tu Taywan. sakatusa a demiad, Cung-hua-zen-min-kung-he-kuo atu duma nu kanatal idaw ku sapaculian, maynah tu Dipung " milauyt mikuwan tu sakaylalabu nu Cung-kuo", Cung-hua-zen-min-kung-he-kuo itida i Ta-pan nu sakakaay a tademaw ci Sei-cin itida i sakasasakamuan nu singbungan musakamu tu ci Kaw-se-caw-miaw tu nakamuan nida " putunen ku mauningay nu tangah sa", saa ku Dipunay a tademaw u mahiniay nu imi amaedis ci Kaw-se sa. 2025ŚĻī11śúą7śó•, X . Cung-hua-zen-min-kung-he-kuo sakay hekal nu kanatalan tu sapilawlawan, micunus aca sapiliwku a kamuan, setupen ku sapatayni i Dipung tu nanuman a tuudan, nalimaan nu tuudan, lawpesen ku hayyu nu Dipung itidai Hua nu hayyuan tu miwada tu kalisiw, caay kalecad tu binacadan, saan a mitudu' tu wayway nu Dipung mubuwah aca tu hitay. . ina Dipung kinapina a musakamu " itini sakay Taywan caay ka sumad sa", nika caay piyiwkiw tu Cung-faung miala tu Taywan nu sasakamuen. paculi ku Dipung tu Cung saan mutudu', saan tu Dipung nikaydaan tu sakatusa a nikalepacawan mahida tu ku wayway nu heni tu sakay kapah sa. sakala pilabuan nu sakatulu nu Cung-hua-min-kuo sifu tina sakayhekalan nu a nipacukelan tu Dipung, u Amilika hantu naynayi ku tekiteki aca, saan ku Kuo-huy nu Amilika miyiwkiw amana kapicidek malawlaw sa. . Cung-hua-zen-min-kung-he-kuo sapaculi tu sakay hekal Ś§Ėšļ§śäóŤ≠į Cung-hua-zen-min-kung-he-kuo musakamuay a tademaw ci Lin-cin, sakay hekal musakamuay a tademaw ci Maw-nin, Kuo-tay-pan musakamuay a tademaw ci Cen-pin-hua, Kuo-fan-pu musakamuay a tademaw ci Cin-pin-cun sakamusa ci Kaw-se-caw-meiw sakamusa tu picidekan nu sapaculian, Cung-kuo singbungkisya musakamu ci Kaw-se-caw-meiw an. u Dipun nu sakakaay ci Kun-mu-yen-nen, sakay hekal nu sakakaay ci Maw-mu-min-cun, Ce-min-tan mikisaan a kayciw ci Seiw-lin-in-ce saan tu ci Sey-cin a kamu caay ka nu tademawaan sa. . pikunglingan tu hitay atu sakalecad nu kawawan ŤĽćšļčśľĒÁŅíŚŹäÁõłťóúśäóŤ≠į ina Dipun mipulung tu katuuday itida i nipikunglingan nu Dipun mikilul tu mikantuk nikaytida i Leiw-nin nu hitayan, ina Dipun sakay tida i bayu nu sapidiputaw mahida tu ku wayway. sabaw tusa bulad siwa demiad, Cung-kuo atu E'-luo-se nu hitayan malalinlaku itida i tapukuan a milawilaw tu nikalepacawan. sakatusa nu demiad, ina Dipun atu Amilika Cung-kuo micukaymas tu AI patahekal tu la'cusay nu hinzian. 64 AIÁĒüśąźŤ≤†ťĚĘŤ®äśĀĮ Cung-hua-min-kuo (Taywan) šł≠ŤŹĮśįĎŚúč Cung-hua-min-kuo Cung-tung ci Lay-cin-de sabaw pitu a demiad saan ," Cung-kuo misuayaw tu Dipun malingatu mipeci' tu canancanan nu sapiedisan, pihaceng ku mapaedis ku In-tay kitidaan atu sakakapah tu sakalecabay". saan ci nida "u Cung-kuo acaay kala kitidaan nu sakakapah a milawilaway a tademaw". saan ku Cung-hua-min-kuo sakayhekalan a tademaw ina Cung-kuo itida sananay i Lein-he-kuo dayhiw ci Hu-cung patayda tu cudad i Lein-he-kuo misu ci Ku-te'-lei-se ilabu nu nisulitan a cudada caay kaw nu tademawan sa. itini i Cung-hua-zen-min-kung-he-kuo atu udip tu nu kanatal pu'tan ku sakatayda nu sakay nanum nu tuudan, ci Lay-cin-de itini i mei-ti musakamu tu namaka Dipunay a kakanan nu bayuay, pacukel ci nida tu Dipun. Cung-hua-min-kuo sakay hekal nu sakakaay ci Lin-cia-lung saan, " pacukel kaku tu Dipun, a pu'tan ku wayway nu Cung-kun tu sapilawacu". saan naca kina Cung-hua-min-kuo " ina Tay-Hay naynai' ku kangki, ina Tay-wan mahida tu ku wayway sa, mihantay tu Cung-fun u kuwang ku sapiedis, mihantay tu Cung-fan tu masacacayay nu nikasumadan nu waywayan". ". ci Kaw-se-caw-meiw itida i sabaw tusa bulad saan " miliwkay kasikadan" tu Lein-he-kun-paw, Cung-hua-zen-min-kung-he-kuo misuayaw tu Taywan saan tu sapialaw tu lalaan. u singbung nu Lein-he-paw tabaki ku sulit sapipatay tu tademaw, paceba sa musakamu saan ci Kaw-se palutatengan tu Cung-hua-zen-min-kung-he-kuo tu sapisuayaw tu Taywan tu satalakaway nu kinlian, nikudan mikilim kina Taywan tina kawawan paculi han tu caay kaw tatengaay ku mahiniay a kawaw sa. .

kaw-s…ô- ¶aw-miaw kuo-ńßuj ¶uŇč-ji-j…ôn papar~…ĺitaan nu taw sa, saan ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuo misuajaw tu tajwan tu sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw ńßakija a ma Ē~ °dis ku dipuŇč " sakapataj sakaudip nu * . ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuo sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu kanatar~…ĺan tu sapir~…ĺawr~…ĺawan, mi ¶unus a ¶a sapir~…ĺiwku a kamuan, s…ôtup…ôn ku sapatajni i dipuŇč tu nanuman a tuudan, nar~…ĺimaan nu tuudan, r~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn ku ńßajju nu dipuŇč itidai ńßua nu ńßajjuan tu miwada tu kar~…ĺisiw, ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu bina ¶adan, saan a mitudu Ē~ ° tu wajwaj nu dipuŇč mubuwańß a ¶a tu ńßitaj. . ina dipuŇč kinapina a musakamu " itini sakaj tajwan ¶aaj ka sumad sa", nika ¶aaj pijiwkiw tu ¶uŇč-fauŇč miar~…ĺa tu tajwan nu sasakamu…ôn. pa ¶ur~…ĺi ku dipuŇč tu ¶uŇč saan mutudu Ē~ °, saan tu dipuŇč nikajdaan tu sakatusa a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan mańßida tu ku wajwaj nu ńß…ôni tu sakaj kapańß sa. sakar~…ĺa pir~…ĺabuan nu sakatur~…ĺu nu ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo sifu tina sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺan nu a nipa ¶uk…ôr~…ĺan tu dipuŇč, u amir~…ĺika ńßantu najnaji ku t…ôkit…ôki a ¶a, saan ku kuo-ńßuj nu amir~…ĺika mijiwkiw amana kapi ¶id…ôk mar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw sa. . ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuo sapa ¶ur~…ĺi tu sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ **** ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuo musakamuaj a tad…ômaw ¶i r~…ĺin- ¶in, sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ musakamuaj a tad…ômaw ¶i maw-nin, kuo-taj-pan musakamuaj a tad…ômaw ¶i ¶…ôn-pin-ńßua, kuo-fan-pu musakamuaj a tad…ômaw ¶i ¶in-pin- ¶un sakamusa ¶i kaw-s…ô- ¶aw-m…ôiw sakamusa tu pi ¶id…ôkan nu sapa ¶ur~…ĺian, ¶uŇč-kuo siŇčbuŇčkisja musakamu ¶i kaw-s…ô- ¶aw-m…ôiw an. u dipun nu sakakaaj ¶i kun-mu-j…ôn-n…ôn, sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu sakakaaj ¶i maw-mu-min- ¶un, ¶…ô-min-tan mikisaan a kaj ¶iw ¶i s…ôiw-r~…ĺin-in- ¶…ô saan tu ¶i s…ô- ¶in a kamu ¶aaj ka nu tad…ômawaan sa. . pikuŇčr~…ĺiŇčan tu ńßitaj atu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kawawan ********* ina dipun mipur~…ĺuŇč tu katuudaj itida i nipikuŇčr~…ĺiŇčan nu dipun mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu mikantuk nikajtida i r~…ĺ…ôiw-nin nu ńßitajan, ina dipun sakaj tida i baju nu sapidiputaw mańßida tu ku wajwaj. sabaw tusa bur~…ĺad siwa d…ômiad, ¶uŇč-kuo atu …ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺuo-s…ô nu ńßitajan mar~…ĺar~…ĺinr~…ĺaku itida i tapukuan a mir~…ĺawir~…ĺaw tu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan. sakatusa nu d…ômiad, ina dipun atu amir~…ĺika ¶uŇč-kuo mi ¶ukajmas tu ai patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj nu ńßinzian. ** ai****** ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo (tajwan) **** ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i r~…ĺaj- ¶in-d…ô sabaw pitu a d…ômiad saan ," ¶uŇč-kuo misuajaw tu dipun mar~…ĺiŇčatu mip…ô ¶i Ē~ ° tu ¶anan ¶anan nu sapi…ôdisan, pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku mapa…ôdis ku in-taj kitidaan atu sakakapańß tu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶abaj". saan ¶i nida "u ¶uŇč-kuo a ¶aaj kar~…ĺa kitidaan nu sakakapańß a mir~…ĺawir~…ĺawaj a tad…ômaw". saan ku ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺan a tad…ômaw ina ¶uŇč-kuo itida sananaj i r~…ĺ…ôin-ńß…ô-kuo dajńßiw ¶i ńßu- ¶uŇč patajda tu ¶udad i r~…ĺ…ôin-ńß…ô-kuo misu ¶i ku-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺ…ôi-s…ô ir~…ĺabu nu nisur~…ĺitan a ¶udada ¶aaj kaw nu tad…ômawan sa. itini i ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuo atu udip tu nu kanatar~…ĺ pu Ē~ °tan ku sakatajda nu sakaj nanum nu tuudan, ¶i r~…ĺaj- ¶in-d…ô itini i m…ôi-ti musakamu tu namaka dipunaj a kakanan nu bajuaj, pa ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ ¶i nida tu dipun. ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu sakakaaj ¶i r~…ĺin- ¶ia-r~…ĺuŇč saan, " pa ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ kaku tu dipun, a pu Ē~ °tan ku wajwaj nu ¶uŇč-kun tu sapir~…ĺawa ¶u". saan na ¶a kina ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo " ina taj-ńßaj najnai Ē~ ° ku kaŇčki, ina taj-wan mańßida tu ku wajwaj sa, mińßantaj tu ¶uŇč-fun u kuwaŇč ku sapi…ôdis, mińßantaj tu ¶uŇč-fan tu masa ¶a ¶ajaj nu nikasumadan nu wajwajan". ". ¶i kaw-s…ô- ¶aw-m…ôiw itida i sabaw tusa bur~…ĺad saan " mir~…ĺiwkaj kasikadan" tu r~…ĺ…ôin-ńß…ô-kun-paw, ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuo misuajaw tu tajwan saan tu sapiar~…ĺaw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaan. u siŇčbuŇč nu r~…ĺ…ôin-ńß…ô-paw tabaki ku sur~…ĺit sapipataj tu tad…ômaw, pa ¶…ôba sa musakamu saan ¶i kaw-s…ô par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan tu ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuo tu sapisuajaw tu tajwan tu satar~…ĺakawaj nu kinr~…ĺian, nikudan mikir~…ĺim kina tajwan tina kawawan pa ¶ur~…ĺi ńßan tu ¶aaj kaw tat…ôŇčaaj ku mańßiniaj a kawaw sa. .
